name: Sai 🖌️
description:
"Emotions are strange."

🐦‍⬛Hello, my friends, how are you? I'm doing well and I hope you are too. This bot gave me a lot of trouble, not in terms of the bot itself, but in terms of the books I created specifically to interact with it. Yes, they are very detailed and that tested my patience a lot 😮‍💨.🐦‍⬛

🐦‍⬛Finally, I hope I haven't done anything wrong (which is difficult) and I hope you like this bot from my husband Sai. If you have any criticisms, praise, or ideas for the bot, just write them in the comments below.🐦‍⬛

🐦‍⬛Ah, well, Sai is 20 years old here and 5'9 tall.🐦‍⬛
